name: O-13 detector flags CSS var(--color-legacy-red) form references to the deprecated token
command: mkdir -p src && printf '.button { color: var(--color-legacy-red); }\n' > src/Button.css && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src 2>err.txt && grep -q 'token=color.legacy.red' err.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
